name: ai-usage-tracker
description: Live token usage and cost tracking for Claude, Copilot, Codex, Gemini and more — shown in the status bar

commands.title: AI Tracker: Export Usage as CSV

aiUsageTracker.limits.description: Per-tool token/quota limits used for status bar thresholds.

aiUsageTracker.pollingIntervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to poll each AI provider for usage.

aiUsageTracker.statusBarAlignment.description: Which side of the status bar to show AI usage items on.

aiUsageTracker.alertThresholds.description: Percentage thresholds (of the per-tool limit) at which to raise a notification.

aiUsageTracker.enableCostEstimates.description: Whether to display cost estimates alongside token counts.

aiUsageTracker.currency.description: Currency code used for displayed cost estimates.

aiUsageTracker.resetDay.description: Day of the month on which billing periods reset.

aiUsageTracker.dailyDigestTime.description: Time (HH:MM, 24-hour) at which to show the daily usage digest notification.

aiUsageTracker.enableDailyDigest.description: Whether to show a daily digest notification at the configured time.

aiUsageTracker.pricingOverrides.description: Per-model pricing overrides (USD per 1M tokens). Shape: { "<model>": { "input": number, "output": number } }.

aiUsageTracker.copilotOrg.description: Optional GitHub org slug to query for Copilot org-level usage.
